framework.name: AP2 Mandate Architecture
framework.description: AP2 uses W3C Verifiable Credentials as cryptographically signed 'Mandates' (Cart Mandate for human-present, Intent Mandate for human-not-present) that travel with the agent. Intent Mandates include TTL, budget constraints, and NLP 'prompt playback' of user intent — this is the closest thing to a portable spending authority spec in production.
framework.raw_quote: Intent Mandate: Human-not-present; SA creates, U signs. Adds 'prompt playback' (NLP summary of user intent) and TTL for temporal limits.

source.title: Secure Use of the Agent Payments Protocol (AP2)
